Structure# WebContentExtensionConfiguration

iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+macOS 14.3+

```
@MainActor @preconcurrency
struct WebContentExtensionConfiguration
```

## [See Also](/documentation/browserenginekit/webcontentextensionconfiguration#see-also)

### [Browser extensions](/documentation/browserenginekit/webcontentextensionconfiguration#Browser-extensions)

[`protocol WebContentExtension`](/documentation/browserenginekit/webcontentextension)An interface for configuring a web content helper extension process that will carry web page decoding operations on behalf of the browser app.[`protocol NetworkingExtension`](/documentation/browserenginekit/networkingextension)An interface for configuring a networking helper extension process that will carry out networking operations on behalf of the browser app.[`struct NetworkingExtensionConfiguration`](/documentation/browserenginekit/networkingextensionconfiguration)[`protocol RenderingExtension`](/documentation/browserenginekit/renderingextension)An interface for configuring a rendering helper extension process that will carry out operations requiring rendering access on behalf of the browser app.[`struct RenderingExtensionConfiguration`](/documentation/browserenginekit/renderingextensionconfiguration)
